I build systems people move through.

Creator economies, AI operating loops, global publishing moments, and a portfolio of product experiments — translated into a cinematic scroll narrative.

SCROLL FOR MORE
DECONSTRUCTED

Not a clone. A scroll system.

The Rockstar reference works because the page behaves like a trailer: full-screen atmosphere, short declarations, chapter breaks, oversized type, and media that changes state as you scroll. This version turns that grammar into InJoo's product story.

Hero atmosphereSticky chapter proofScrubbed media motionHorizontal case-study strip
01
Creator Economy

SOOP creator ecosystem

5,000+ creators · operations · monetization · community health

I design the loops behind creator growth: acquisition, incentives, events, dashboards, and platform policy that keep a live community moving without losing trust.

+60% event participation liftSenior Product Manager · Seoul
SignalCreator loopRecruit → activate → retain

02
AI Product Ops

Automation as leverage

Python · SQL · GPT systems · reviewable pipelines

From creator operations to personal ventures, I build pragmatic AI/data pipelines that compress repetitive workflows into measurable, reviewable systems.

AI-backed execution pipelinesProduct × data × automation
EngineOps graphCollect → decide → ship

From operations to product systems

Scroll becomes proof: context, motion, metrics, then contact.

03
Global Platforms

Gaming, streaming, launch rhythm

NEXON partnership · G-Star · publishing · creator acquisition

MarketLaunch mapPartner → localize → learn

04
Product Systems

Portfolio of experiments

YouTube · apps · commerce · education · productized agents
